[Coffee Mate MCP Server](../../../index.md) / testing/utility/mcp-server-introspection.utility

# ~~testing/utility/mcp-server-introspection.utility~~

> **Test Support Layer**

Reflection-based introspection of [McpServer](https://github.com/modelcontextprotocol/typescript-sdk) internals for
test assertions.

## Deprecated

All exports in this module are deprecated.  The
Effect-TS migration replaced the Zod-based tool schemas with
Effect Schema + `toStandardSchema`, making the
`_registeredTools` reflection path unreliable.  Prefer testing
tool behavior through the MCP protocol (e.g., `tools/list` via
`StreamableHTTPClientTransport`) instead of reflecting on
server internals.

## Remarks

Every function accesses private [McpServer](https://github.com/modelcontextprotocol/typescript-sdk) fields
(`_registeredTools`, `server._serverInfo`) via [Reflect.get](https://developer.mozilla.org/en-US/docs/Web/JavaScript/Reference).
Because these fields are implementation details of the SDK, they
may break on any SDK upgrade.

| Export                                                        | Purpose               |
| ------------------------------------------------------------- | --------------------- |
| [getRegisteredTools](functions/getRegisteredTools.md)         | Full tools map        |
| [getRegisteredTool](functions/getRegisteredTool.md)           | Single tool lookup    |
| [getRegisteredToolNames](functions/getRegisteredToolNames.md) | Tool name list        |
| [getSchemaShape](functions/getSchemaShape.md)                 | Zod schema shape      |
| [getServerInfoValue](functions/getServerInfoValue.md)         | Server name / version |

## Functions

| Function                                                          | Description                                                                                                                                                                                                     |
| ----------------------------------------------------------------- | --------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- |
| [~~getRegisteredTools~~](functions/getRegisteredTools.md)         | Retrieves the internal `_registeredTools` map from an [McpServer](https://github.com/modelcontextprotocol/typescript-sdk) via [Reflect.get](https://developer.mozilla.org/en-US/docs/Web/JavaScript/Reference). |
| [~~getRegisteredTool~~](functions/getRegisteredTool.md)           | Looks up a single registered tool by name from a tools record obtained via [getRegisteredTools](functions/getRegisteredTools.md).                                                                               |
| [~~getRegisteredToolNames~~](functions/getRegisteredToolNames.md) | Returns the names of all registered tools on an [McpServer](https://github.com/modelcontextprotocol/typescript-sdk).                                                                                            |
| [~~getSchemaShape~~](functions/getSchemaShape.md)                 | Extracts the Zod schema `shape` from a tool's `inputSchema` definition.                                                                                                                                         |
| [~~getServerInfoValue~~](functions/getServerInfoValue.md)         | Reads a server info field (`name` or `version`) from the internal MCP server state via reflection.                                                                                                              |
